text_excerpt: News | Neil O'Brien Skip to main content Neil O'Brien Member of Parliament for Harborough, Oadby & Wigston Main navigation Home About Neil News Campaigns Contact Neil O'Brien Member of Parliament for Harborough, Oadby & Wigston News Victory on University land in Oadby Thursday, 30 April, 2026 I welcome the exclusion of University of Leicester land in Oadby from the Borough Council’s latest Local Plan – but pressure for development remains intense. Two University-owned sites had been put forward as potential locations for major housing developments comprising thousands of homes: land at the former Manor Road athletics track and the Stoughton Road playing fields. Both have now been... Articles UPDATE: Good news on Burford Green 25th April 2026 Plans to build over much of this well-used green space have now been paused after a strong local backlash - with over 1,300 residents signing a petition. At a... Articles UPDATE: Little Hill bus changes 18th April 2026 This week I met up with Arriva to talk about the changes with the 47/48/44 . Basically the 47 and 48 run round a big triangular route into Leicester in opposite...
